texto: Europe is difficult to coordinate, and our main deficit may not even lie in this area of finance and economics, but in foreign and security policy. We have a leadership problem because we are still 27 different members who have still not decided on how to work with each other based on what we used to call a European constitution.
explicacao: Citação de Peer Steinbruck sobre temas ligados a lideranca. “Europe is difficult to coordinate, and our main deficit may not even lie in this area of finance …” articula lideranca, leadership, work em registro de lideranca, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e work.
